description: Labib Yasir discusses his journey from training in MMA to becoming the co-founder and CEO of KO, sharing insights on content creation and growth strategies for startups.
topic_summary: Labib Yasir shares his background in MMA and how it transformed his life, leading to his current role as CEO of KO. He reflects on his experience in content creation with React Media and the lessons learned about audience engagement and marketing strategies [t=49:25].
